title: RUBI | 5mm Tile Leveling Wedges | Wedges for Tiling | Ceramic Tile Fixers | Easy Fitting and Removal | Wedges 3/16" (5MM.)- (B-250 U.)
features: ✔️ Ceramic tile fixers, particularly for flooring jobs, know that the best possible finishes are achieved using RUBI wedges for tiling.
🔝 RUBI wedges for tiling are manufactured with quality base material and are completely free from impurities and imperfections.
🛠️ RUBI wedges for tiling let you align the slopes and curvatures that can appear with ceramic tiles during tiling jobs.
📏 RUBI wedges for tiling are 31 mm long, allowing for an easy fitting and removal.
🔶 Owing to their bright red colour, RUBI wedges for tiling are easy to locate, for both fitting and removing them.
